productDisplayName: Playboy Men Casual Blue Flip Flops
description: Comfort and style rolled into one - that's playboy for you. Revel in the comfort of flip flops with this summery pair in blue from Playboy. UpperRubber thong straps that are smooth for absolute comfort Textured on the upper with brand badgeToe separator to hold the foot in placeSoft, cushioned rubber footbed with printed brand name and logo across the length of the right slipper footbedOustoleSingle piece flexible and cushioned rubber footbed and outsole for all-day comfortBunny logo-styled lugs throughout the footbed for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesFlip flop careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
